question_text: A kettle has a power rating of 2000 W. Which statement about the kettle is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The kettle transfers 2000 joules of energy every second

options.label: B
options.text: The kettle uses 2000 joules of energy in total

options.label: C
options.text: The kettle transfers energy 2000 times faster than other kettles

options.label: D
options.text: The kettle's temperature increases by 2000 degrees

explanation: A power rating of 2000 W means the kettle transfers 2000 joules of electrical energy into heat energy every second. Power is always measured as energy per unit time, so option A correctly interprets the power rating.
